skills.name: Agitator Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Agitator skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Agitator skill.

skills.name: Artillery Secret
skills.description: Raises the maximum level of the Artillery skill.

levels.description: Raises the maximum level of the Artillery skill.

skills.name: Weakness Exploit
skills.description: Increases the affinity of attacks that exploit a monster weak spot.

levels.description: Attacks that hit weak spots have 10% increased affinity, with an extra 5% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 15% increased affinity, with an extra 15% on wounded parts.
Attacks that hit weak spots have 30% increased affinity, with an extra 20% on wounded parts.

skills.name: Guard
skills.description: Reduces knockbacks and stamina depletion when guarding.

levels.description: Very slightly decreases the impact of attacks.
Slightly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 15%.
Greatly decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 30%.
Massively decreases the impact of attacks and reduces stamina depletion by 50%.

skills.name: Agitator
skills.description: Increases attack power and affinity when large monsters become enraged.

levels.description: While active, grants attack +4 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +8 and increases affinity by 5%.
While active, grants attack +12 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +16 and increases affinity by 7%.
While active, grants attack +20 and increases affinity by 10%.
While active, grants attack +24 and increases affinity by 15%.
While active, grants attack +28 and increases affinity by 20%.

skills.name: Blast Attack
skills.description: Increases the rate of blast buildup. (Elemental buildup has a maximum limit.)

levels.description: Blast buildup +5% Bonus: +10
Blast buildup +10% Bonus: +10
Blast buildup +20% Bonus: +10
Blast buildup +30% Bonus: +10

skills.name: Artillery
skills.description: Strengthens explosive attacks like gunlance shells, Wyvern's Fire, charge blade phial attacks, and sticky ammo.

levels.description: Increases power of each attack by 10% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 15%.
Increases power of each attack by 20% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 30%.
Increases power of each attack by 30% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 50%.
Increases power of each attack by 40% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 60%.
Increases power of each attack by 50% and reduces Wyvern's Fire cooldown by 70%.

skills.name: Speed Sharpening
skills.description: Speeds up weapon sharpening when using a whetstone.

levels.description: Removes one cycle from the sharpening process.
Removes two cycles from the sharpening process.
Removes three cycles from the sharpening process.
